results.justification: EXACT TWIN — training-free framework merging multiple distinct persona vectors in activation space IS the dual-equal-persona-attractor mechanism of ZOU-HUN-BASIN.
Persona-vector activation-level decoding + control IS the underlying steering mechanism ZOU-HUN-BASIN uses for v_A, v_B.
Steering coefficient α controlling intervention strength IS the per-query router scalar α of ZOU-HUN-BASIN.
Contrastive-activation persona vectors for strategic-choice steering covers the dual-attractor steering paradigm.
PSR token-specific α estimated from activations IS the query-conditional router of ZOU-HUN-BASIN.
Dynamic LLM routing covers the routing-between-personas paradigm at coarser granularity.
Semantic routing for mixture-of-models covers the per-query selection-between-modes paradigm.
Persona-attractor framework IS the conceptual basis for v_A/v_B dual-attractor steering.
